title: Persist scheduled review run summaries and score deltas
summary: Persist scheduled review run summaries and score deltas
acceptanceCriteria: Scheduled reviews can be registered or previewed without unsafe writes.
Review run summaries and score deltas can be persisted.
Approval gates and dashboard status fields are represented.
reviewNotes: Implemented in the Hermes OS native command, task-generation, dashboard, persistence, scheduled review, runtime policy, template registry, and execution-readiness work already recorded in docs/hermes-os-integration-log.md.
